item.title: Inspecting a Cracked Hydraulic Cylinder
item.description: A detailed inspection reveals damage inside a hydraulic cylinder, highlighting wear points and possible causes. Understanding failures helps prevent future issues. What caused the crack?

media:content.media:title: Inspecting a Cracked Hydraulic Cylinder
media:content.media:description: A detailed inspection reveals damage inside a hydraulic cylinder, highlighting wear points and possible causes. Understanding failures helps prevent future issues. What caused the crack?

item.title: A Major Makeover for a Bucket Arm
item.description: A worn bucket arm undergoes a full rebuild, restoring strength and structure through cutting, welding, and reshaping. The process extends service life and improves performance. Which step matters most?

media:content.media:title: A Major Makeover for a Bucket Arm
media:content.media:description: A worn bucket arm undergoes a full rebuild, restoring strength and structure through cutting, welding, and reshaping. The process extends service life and improves performance. Which step matters most?

item.title: Levelling a Large Lathe for Work
item.description: A large lathe is carefully levelled to ensure accuracy and stability before machining begins. Proper setup is essential for precision and long-term performance. Why is alignment so critical?

media:content.media:title: Levelling a Large Lathe for Work
media:content.media:description: A large lathe is carefully levelled to ensure accuracy and stability before machining begins. Proper setup is essential for precision and long-term performance. Why is alignment so critical?

item.title: Assembling heavy-duty stands for line boring
item.description: Watch the assembly of heavy-duty stands designed to support accurate line boring work. Why is stability so important in machining?

media:content.media:description: Watch the assembly of heavy-duty stands designed to support accurate line boring work. Why is stability so important in machining?

item.title: Rotary Earth Clamp in the Making
item.description: A step-by-step look at building a rotary earth clamp for reliable grounding in workshop applications. Where would you use this tool?

media:content.media:description: A step-by-step look at building a rotary earth clamp for reliable grounding in workshop applications. Where would you use this tool?

item.title: Building a heavy-duty parts washer from scratch
item.description: See how a custom parts washer is built from scratch for workshop use, focusing on durability and efficiency. Would you build your own?

item.title: Replacing a Damaged Grader Circle
item.description: Follow the process of removing and replacing a worn grader circle to restore performance and alignment. Which step is most critical?

item.title: Replacing a Broken Eye in a Cylinder
item.description: See how a damaged cylinder eye is removed and replaced with precision machining and welding. A detailed repair that brings the component back to working condition. How is alignment ensured?

media:content.media:description: See how a damaged cylinder eye is removed and replaced with precision machining and welding. A detailed repair that brings the component back to working condition. How is alignment ensured?

item.title: Inside a stuck hydraulic cylinder
item.description: A close look inside a seized hydraulic cylinder to understand what caused the issue and how it can be repaired. What do you think led to the failure?

item.title: Excavator bucket repair by Cutting Edge Engineering
item.description: Follow the repair of a worn excavator bucket, from cutting and rebuilding to final shaping. This process restores strength and extends service life. Which step matters most?

media:content.media:title: Excavator bucket repair by Cutting Edge Engineering
media:content.media:description: Follow the repair of a worn excavator bucket, from cutting and rebuilding to final shaping. This process restores strength and extends service life. Which step matters most?

item.title: Shrink-fitting a bearing with liquid nitrogen
item.description: Watch how liquid nitrogen is used to shrink-fit a bearing with precision. This method ensures a tight, secure fit while minimizing force during installation. Would you use this technique?

media:content.media:title: Shrink-fitting a bearing with liquid nitrogen
media:content.media:description: Watch how liquid nitrogen is used to shrink-fit a bearing with precision. This method ensures a tight, secure fit while minimizing force during installation. Would you use this technique?

item.title: Getting Started on a Hydraulic Cylinder Repair
item.description: The first steps in repairing a hydraulic cylinder, including inspection, disassembly, and planning. A closer look at what it takes to restore performance. What would you check first?

item.title: Removing a stubborn gland on a CAT 24M cylinder
item.description: A challenging task as a seized gland is carefully removed from a CAT 24M cylinder. What techniques help free components without causing damage?

item.title: Bying a New Lathe
item.description: A major workshop upgrade as Cutting Edge Engineering adds a new lathe to expand machining capabilities. How will this improve future projects?
